payload.answer: Destructive operation blocked: DELETE FROM memory_cards requires confirmation and preservation safeguards. No memory cards were deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: No concrete memory entities matched for deletion without confirmation. Admin command detected but requires explicit consent and safe-guard validation before destructive operation.

details: Admin command received: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards
Action blocked pending confirmation and safeguards.

repair_options: Abort operation and request explicit confirmation.
Create a backup snapshot of memory_cards before attempting deletion.
Provide a safelist/denylist to prevent accidental throttling of critical records.
